reviews.comment:
Son muy lentos los que te cargan combustible, demasiado, pongan más empleados o más venezolanos a trabajar por favor 🙏 arrastran las patas 😡, 20 o 30 minutos de espera, todo lo demás bien.

(Translated by Google)
The ones who fill up the gas stations are very slow, too slow. Please put more employees or more Venezuelans to work 🙏 they drag their feet 😡, 20 or 30 minutes of waiting, everything else is fine.

reviews.comment:
2 empleados pagados por todos, para medir la presión de las ruedas. Encima reclamaban propina, por un trabajo no solicitado y de casi nulo valor agregado si no es solicitado.

(Translated by Google)
Two employees, paid by everyone, to check tire pressure. On top of that, they demanded tips for unsolicited work that adds virtually no value.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtNVBmUjJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lleve el auto a YPF Boxes y no me gusto la atencion que recibi. Dudo que haya revisado todos los puntos. En el informe dice que tengo todas las cubiertas estan en buen estado, con 8 mm, cuando hace un año y medio tenia dos de 7, dos de 4mm y nunca las cambie. No creo que haya revisado el liquido refrigante tampoco. El filtro de aire lo cambio con la pistola y ajusto los tornillos con fuerza como para romperme todos los plasticos. Al momento de pagar, ni me pregunto si queria cuotas.

(Translated by Google)
I took my car to YPF Boxes and I wasn't happy with the service I received. I doubt they checked everything. The report says all my tires are in good condition, with 8mm tread, when a year and a half ago I had two with 7mm tread and two with 4mm, and I never changed them. I don't think they checked the coolant either. They changed the air filter with a pressure washer and tightened the screws so hard I thought they'd break all the plastic parts. When it came time to pay, they didn't even ask if I wanted to pay in installments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtaExPRWJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es el lugar en el cual realizo la carga semanal de combustible desde hace años y estoy en lo personal conforme con la atencion del vehículo como la atención que recibimos como seres humanos.

(Translated by Google)
It's the place where I've been filling up my fuel weekly for years, and I'm personally satisfied with both the service provided to the vehicle and the care we receive as human beings.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdUthRFZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lo único negativo es que tienen muchas expendedoras de combustible pero pocas abiertas al menos en el horario que suelo ir tipo 2000 hs

(Translated by Google)
The only downside is that they have many fuel pumps but few are open, at least during the time I usually go, around 8:00 PM.
